# ba_cva_reduced_v1 fixture pack

Synthetic reduced BA-CVA cases for delivered-slice validation.

| Case | Regulatory intent | Citation ids |
| --- | --- | --- |
| sovereign_ig | Table 1 sovereign IG 0.5% with non-IMM DF | basel_mar50_16, basel_mar50_15_4 |
| financial_hy | Table 1 financial HY 12% with IMM DF=1 | basel_mar50_16, basel_mar50_15_4 |
| invalid_ead | Negative EAD rejected before capital | validation |

These fixtures are synthetic implementation references only; they do not represent final regulatory capital.
